title: Grind combs and cutters for machine shearing
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Grind combs and cutters for machine shearing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine need for sharpening combs and cutters

pcs.text: Check combs and cutters for wear and report any issues found to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check combs and cutters for wear and report any issues found to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check combs and cutters for wear and report any issues found to supervisor.

pcs.text: Clean combs and cutters prior to grinding in line with work health and safety (WHS) and biosecurity standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean combs and cutters prior to grinding in line with work health and safety (WHS) and biosecurity standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean combs and cutters prior to grinding in line with work health and safety (WHS) and biosecurity standards.

pcs.text: Communicate with wool harvesting team members to identify potential WHS hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate with wool harvesting team members to identify potential WHS hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with wool harvesting team members to identify potential WHS hazards and report to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine need for sharpening combs and cutters

elements.title: Prepare grinder and pendulum for use

pcs.text: Check the grinder and its location for serviceability and safety and report safety hazards to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the grinder and its location for serviceability and safety and report safety hazards to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the grinder and its location for serviceability and safety and report safety hazards to supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify grinder faults or malfunctions and report to supervisor for repair or replacement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify grinder faults or malfunctions and report to supervisor for repair or replacement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify grinder faults or malfunctions and report to supervisor for repair or replacement.

pcs.text: Apply grinding papers to grinder discs according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply grinding papers to grinder discs according to manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply grinding papers to grinder discs according to manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Store and care for grinding papers in line with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store and care for grinding papers in line with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store and care for grinding papers in line with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Check, clean and adjust the bottom bar of the pendulum to ensure it is true
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check, clean and adjust the bottom bar of the pendulum to ensure it is true?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check, clean and adjust the bottom bar of the pendulum to ensure it is true.

pcs.text: Confirm that the pressure bar and pins are set at the recommended distance according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that the pressure bar and pins are set at the recommended distance according to manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that the pressure bar and pins are set at the recommended distance according to manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Check the height setting of the pendulum
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the height setting of the pendulum?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the height setting of the pendulum.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare grinder and pendulum for use

elements.title: Carry out grinding

pcs.text: Use appropriate eye personal protective equipment (PPE) while grinding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use appropriate eye personal protective equipment (PPE) while grinding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use appropriate eye personal protective equipment (PPE) while grinding.

pcs.text: Secure comb or cutter for grinding according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Secure comb or cutter for grinding according to manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Secure comb or cutter for grinding according to manufacturer specifications.

pcs.text: Apply correct pressure while grinding in line with workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply correct pressure while grinding in line with workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply correct pressure while grinding in line with workplace standards.

pcs.text: Grind combs and cutters as directed and according to WHS
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Grind combs and cutters as directed and according to WHS?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Grind combs and cutters as directed and according to WHS.

pcs.text: Check combs and cutters visually for even grinding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check combs and cutters visually for even grinding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check combs and cutters visually for even grinding.

pcs.text: Identify and rectify faults or unevenness in grinding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and rectify faults or unevenness in grinding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and rectify faults or unevenness in grinding.

pcs.text: Ensure grinding wheel is not left running when unattended
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure grinding wheel is not left running when unattended?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure grinding wheel is not left running when unattended.
